data.name: Little Red: Caught on Tape
data.detailed_description:
Little Red: Caught on Tape is a traditional fighting game with hand-drawn animation featuring new and returning characters from Pokilewd's Little Red series of adult comics.

Features

  • Local multiplayer gameplay inspired by traditional fighting games like Street Fighter II, but with mechanics borrowed from platform fighters to simplify how players interface with the controls.

  • Six supernatural characters, each with their own uniquely creative move set.

  • A cinematic story mode featuring fully-voiced explicit cutscenes with beautiful hand-drawn animation by Pokilewd.

  • A stylized fantasy aesthetic inspired by monster movies, VHS tapes, and found footage. Vampires, zombies, and werewolves!

data.short_description: Little Red: Caught on Tape is an adults-only traditional fighting game with local multiplayer, beautiful hand-drawn animation, and a fully-voiced cinematic story mode.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 1.2GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 1.4GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: game looks best at 1440p resolution
